title: task
description: rust/lichen-ipv6/src/lib.rs:719 - verify_icmpv6_checksum() passes local_addr as the destination, but should use ip_header.dst. When a packet is sent to a multicast address (e.g., Neighbor Solicitation to ff02::1:ffXX:XXXX), the checksum was computed using that multicast address. Verifying with local_addr (the unicast address) will cause valid checksums to be rejected. Fix: change line 719 from 'verify_icmpv6_checksum(&ip_header.src, local_addr, icmpv6_payload)' to 'verify_icmpv6_checksum(&ip_header.src, &ip_header.dst, icmpv6_payload)'
close_reason: Already fixed: verify_icmpv6_checksum now uses &ip_header.dst instead of local_addr (line 741). This correctly handles multicast packets like Neighbor Solicitation to solicited-node addresses. All 11 tests pass.
